requirement_topic.en: Authorized Bolivian Importer / NIT Tax Registration Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: 授权玻利维亚进口商 / NIT税务登记要求
requirement_topic.zht: 授權玻利維亞進口商 / NIT稅務登記要求

summary.en: To import and sell wireless or telecom terminal equipment in Bolivia, a Chinese manufacturer or exporter must designate an authorized Bolivian importer or local representative. The Bolivian importer must hold a valid NIT (Número de Identificación Tributaria — national tax identification number) issued by the SIN (Servicio de Impuestos Nacionales, Bolivia's tax authority). The importer's name and NIT must appear on the Spanish-language product label. The Bolivian importer is responsible for supporting the ATT homologación application, holding the import declaration with Aduana Nacional (Bolivia's customs authority), and complying with post-market obligations such as safety recalls. Bolivia is a landlocked country; most Chinese goods transit through ports in Chile (Arica, Iquique) or Peru (Ilo, Matarani) before clearing Bolivian customs at border crossing points such as Tambo Quemado or Desaguadero. Commercial invoice, packing list, and certificate of origin are required for Aduana Nacional customs clearance.
summary.zh: 要在玻利维亚进口和销售无线或电信终端设备，中国制造商或出口商须指定一名授权玻利维亚进口商或当地代表。玻利维亚进口商须持有由SIN（玻利维亚国家税务局）颁发的有效NIT（全国税务识别号）。进口商名称和NIT须标注在西班牙语产品标签上。玻利维亚进口商负责支持ATT型式认证申请、向Aduana Nacional（玻利维亚海关）持有进口申报单，并履行市场后义务（如安全召回）。玻利维亚为内陆国；大多数中国商品须经智利（阿里卡、伊基克）或秘鲁（伊洛、马塔拉尼）港口过境，再经Tambo Quemado或Desaguadero等边境口岸完成玻利维亚海关清关。Aduana Nacional清关要求提供商业发票、装箱单和原产地证书。
summary.zht: 要在玻利維亞進口和銷售無線或電信終端裝置，中國製造商或出口商須指定一名授權玻利維亞進口商或當地代表。玻利維亞進口商須持有由SIN（玻利維亞國家稅務局）頒發的有效NIT（全國稅務識別號）。進口商名稱和NIT須標注在西班牙語產品標籤上。玻利維亞進口商負責支持ATT型式認證申請、向Aduana Nacional（玻利維亞海關）持有進口申報單，並履行市場後義務（如安全召回）。玻利維亞為內陸國；大多數中國商品須經智利（阿里卡、伊基克）或秘魯（伊洛、馬塔拉尼）港口過境，再經Tambo Quemado或Desaguadero等邊境口岸完成玻利維亞海關清關。Aduana Nacional清關要求提供商業發票、裝箱單和原產地證書。

standards_or_laws: Ley General de Telecomunicaciones No. 164 (2011) — importer and agent obligations
SIN (Servicio de Impuestos Nacionales) NIT registration requirements
Aduana Nacional de Bolivia customs import requirements
ATT homologación application — authorized importer / local representative requirement

summary.en: For domestic China sales, no equivalent local-importer requirement exists — Chinese manufacturers sell directly through domestic distribution channels. For exports, China has no outbound regulatory requirement mandating a foreign importer structure. Chinese export declarations are filed with China Customs (GACC) by the Chinese exporter. There is no China-side equivalent that substitutes for the Bolivian NIT importer requirement.
summary.zh: 对于中国国内销售，不存在等效的当地进口商要求——中国制造商直接通过国内分销渠道销售。对于出口，中国没有要求外国进口商结构的出口监管要求。中国出口申报由中国出口商向中国海关（GACC）申报。不存在可替代玻利维亚NIT进口商要求的中国端等效机制。
summary.zht: 對於中國國內銷售，不存在等效的當地進口商要求——中國製造商直接通過國內分銷渠道銷售。對於出口，中國沒有要求外國進口商結構的出口監管要求。中國出口申報由中國出口商向中國海關（GACC）申報。不存在可替代玻利維亞NIT進口商要求的中國端等效機制。

standards_or_laws: GACC (General Administration of Customs of China) export declaration requirements
China export documentation: commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting wireless devices to Bolivia must establish a relationship with an authorized Bolivian importer or representative that holds a valid NIT. There is no China-side equivalent of this requirement. The Bolivian importer's name and NIT must appear on the product label; the importer also plays a role in the ATT homologación application process. Chinese exporters without a Bolivian distribution partner cannot legally import or sell wireless devices in Bolivia. Bolivia's landlocked geography adds transit logistics complexity — customs clearance routes through Chilean or Peruvian ports must be factored into the supply chain.
gap.zh: 向玻利维亚出口无线设备的中国制造商须与持有有效NIT的授权玻利维亚进口商或代表建立合作关系。中国端不存在与此等效的要求。玻利维亚进口商的名称和NIT须标注在产品标签上；进口商在ATT型式认证申请过程中也发挥重要作用。没有玻利维亚分销合作伙伴的中国出口商无法在玻利维亚合法进口或销售无线设备。玻利维亚内陆地理位置增加了物流过境复杂性——须在供应链规划中考虑经智利或秘鲁港口的清关路线。
gap.zht: 向玻利維亞出口無線裝置的中國製造商須與持有有效NIT的授權玻利維亞進口商或代表建立合作關係。中國端不存在與此等效的要求。玻利維亞進口商的名稱和NIT須標注在產品標籤上；進口商在ATT型式認證申請過程中也發揮重要作用。沒有玻利維亞分銷合作夥伴的中國出口商無法在玻利維亞合法進口或銷售無線裝置。玻利維亞內陸地理位置增加了物流過境複雜性——須在供應鏈規劃中考慮經智利或秘魯港口的清關路線。

source.publisher: SIN — Servicio de Impuestos Nacionales, Bolivia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An authorized Bolivian importer or representative holding a valid NIT (SIN national tax registration) is mandatory for importing and selling wireless or telecom terminal devices in Bolivia. There is no China-side equivalent of this requirement. The importer's name and NIT must appear on Spanish-language product labels, and the importer supports the ATT homologación application. Chinese exporters must identify and contract a compliant Bolivian importer partner before shipment. Bolivia's landlocked status means transit logistics through Chile or Peru must be planned in advance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在玻利维亚进口和销售无线或电信终端设备，须有持有效NIT（SIN全国税务登记）的授权玻利维亚进口商或代表，此为强制性要求。中国端不存在等效要求。进口商名称和NIT须标注在西班牙语产品标签上，进口商同时支持ATT型式认证申请。中国出口商须在发货前确认并签约符合要求的玻利维亚进口商合作伙伴。玻利维亚内陆国地位意味着须提前规划经智利或秘鲁的过境物流。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在玻利維亞進口和銷售無線或電信終端裝置，須有持有效NIT（SIN全國稅務登記）的授權玻利維亞進口商或代表，此為強制性要求。中國端不存在等效要求。進口商名稱和NIT須標注在西班牙語產品標籤上，進口商同時支持ATT型式認證申請。中國出口商須在發貨前確認並簽約符合要求的玻利維亞進口商合作夥伴。玻利維亞內陸國地位意味著須提前規劃經智利或秘魯的過境物流。
